title: Quiz: Introduction to Grover's Algorithm
description: Test your understanding of Grover's algorithm basics

questions.question: What type of speedup does Grover's algorithm provide?
questions.explanation: Grover's provides quadratic speedup: O(√N) instead of O(N).

questions.question: For N = 1,000,000 items, approximately how many queries does Grover's algorithm need?
The two main components of Grover's algorithm are:
questions.explanation: The oracle marks the solution, the diffusion operator amplifies it.

questions.question: Grover's algorithm can break AES-256 encryption by halving its effective key length.
questions.explanation: Grover's halves the effective security: AES-256 becomes effectively AES-128.
